parsed_output.justification: Kevin claims to be the Seer and confirms that Jessica is the Minion. Jessica admits to being the Minion and explicitly states that she does not see any Werewolves among the players, suggesting the Werewolf card is in the center. Since the Minion has perfect information regarding the presence of Werewolves, her claim that the Werewolf is in the middle indicates that no player currently holds the Werewolf role.
